summary: Comprehensive testing of LEAMSS Immigration Portal MySQL version completed. All 42 backend API tests pass (100%). All 4 user roles (Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client) login and access dashboards successfully. All key features verified working: pending sales approval, user management, products with workflow steps, partner sales creation, case management, ticketing system, and client document workflow.

categories.users_api: 4/4 passed - Admin can list users, role-based access works
categories.products_api: 5/5 passed - CRUD with workflow steps works
categories.sales_api: 4/4 passed - Sales listing and stats work
categories.cases_api: 5/5 passed - Case management works for all roles
categories.reports_api: 4/4 passed - Dashboard stats and reports work
categories.role_dashboards: 4/4 passed - All role-specific dashboard endpoints work

frontend_tests.login_page: PASSED - Loads correctly with demo credentials displayed
frontend_tests.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Stats, pending sales, tickets, navigation all working
frontend_tests.admin_pending_sales: PASSED - Can view pending sales with Assign & Approve dropdown
frontend_tests.admin_users: PASSED - User list by role, Create User button visible
frontend_tests.admin_tickets: PASSED - Ticket list with filters, stats displayed
frontend_tests.case_manager_dashboard: PASSED - My Cases, Pending Review, stats working
frontend_tests.case_manager_cases: PASSED - Case list with status and workflow steps
frontend_tests.partner_my_sales: PASSED - Sales list with New Sale form working
frontend_tests.client_dashboard: PASSED - Case progress, workflow steps, documents tabs
frontend_tests.client_raise_ticket: PASSED - Create Support Ticket modal working

features_verified: Login for all 4 roles (Admin, Case Manager, Partner, Client) - VERIFIED
Admin dashboard - view stats, pending sales, tickets - VERIFIED
Admin - approve/reject pending sales (UI shows Assign & Approve dropdown) - VERIFIED
Admin - manage users (create, edit, delete) - VERIFIED
Admin - manage products with workflow steps - VERIFIED
Partner dashboard - view sales, commission - VERIFIED
Partner - create new sale (form with client details, product, documents) - VERIFIED
Case Manager dashboard - view cases, pending reviews - VERIFIED
Case Manager - view and manage case workflow steps - VERIFIED
Client dashboard - view case progress, documents - VERIFIED
Client - upload documents (workflow steps tab) - VERIFIED
Ticketing system - create, view, respond to tickets - VERIFIED
Notifications - view and mark as read - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing seeded data from iteration 11.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LEAMSS Immigration Portal MySQL version fully tested and working. All 4 user roles have functional dashboards with role-specific features. Backend uses MySQL/MariaDB on 127.0.0.1:3306, database: leamss_portal. Test file /app/tests/test_mysql_migration.py contains 42 comprehensive tests covering all API endpoints. No issues found in this iteration.
